dc:title: Cyclist on a wooded rural road near Isola Farnese
dc:description: Color photograph of a sunlit dirt or gravel road cutting through dense green woodland. A single person stands near the center-right of the road beside a loaded touring bicycle fitted with rear panniers and gear. The path is shaded by overhanging trees and high earthen banks, forming a tunnel-like corridor that recedes into the distance. On the right side, a wire fence and a posted sign read "Proprietà Università Agraria di Isola Farnese," indicating private or institutional land. Dry leaves and dappled sunlight are visible across the road surface.
